title: 2025-10-07 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 4.89
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2025-10-07: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 4.89/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-10-07, the score printed 4.89/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
